title: Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
company: Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners family as a Credit Analyst in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners:
Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners!
